label: GREEN
summary: Baseline: only scattered signals are visible and no critical overlap is currently derived from the engine.
summaryEt: Baasjoon: nähtavad on vaid hajusad signaalid ja mootor ei tuleta praegu kriitilist kattuvust.
rationale: No active red flags derived from current signals.
rationaleEt: Kogutud signaalidest ei tuletata praegu aktiivseid punaseid lippe.
